design_philosophy: Minimal, Monochrome, Premium. High-contrast objective layout focusing on content hierarchy. Function-first, utilizing stark white and deep black with 1px borders, avoiding gradients entirely. Inspired by Stripe and Notion dashboard design principles emphasizing simplicity, ample white space, and neutral color palettes.

layout.strategy: Fintech SaaS dashboard layout with left sidebar and top navbar. Clean, bento-grid inspired where appropriate, but strictly functional.
layout.spacing: Generous internal padding (p-6, p-8) for cards. Grid gap-6.
layout.borders: 1px solid border-zinc-200. No soft floating shadows without borders.

components.navbar: Sticky top, border-b border-zinc-200, backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80.
components.cards: bg-white border border-zinc-200 rounded-lg p-6 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

motion.hover: Subtle background color shifts and slight shadow elevations.
motion.active: Scale down effect (scale-95) for button clicks.
motion.page_transition: Fade in with slight upward motion.

components_instructions: Use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts like the dashboard wrapper.
Use Shadcn UI components for complex interactions: Table, Dialog, DropdownMenu, Tabs, Form, Select.
Do not use Shadcn 'Card' if it restricts creative layouts; build custom card divs with pure Tailwind if needed, otherwise standard Shadcn Card is fine for simple data.
Ensure all interactive elements have hover and focus states with visible contrast.
accessibility: Include data-testid on all interactive elements.
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Provide clear focus rings on inputs and buttons (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-zinc-900).

logo.description: Bold letter A monochrome logo for Artha.

auth_background.description: Minimalist abstract architectural lines for auth screen background.

vendor_1.description: Modern minimalist coffee shop exterior black and white.

vendor_2.description: Cafe interior with views of the city outside.

vendor_3.description: Black and white image of a coffee shop window.

icons.instructions: Use consistent stroke-width, preferably 1.5, to match the clean, thin lines of the UI.
